title: LCID Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts - Nasdaq
text: Lucid Group, Inc. Common Stock (LCID) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts on Nasdaq. Historical Earnings Data. Nasdaq maintains comprehensive earnings data for Lucid Group (LCID) including quarterly report dates, earnings forecasts, and historical results across all quarters from 2021 through 2026. The platform provides analyst consensus estimates and actual reported results for both revenue and earnings per share metrics. Earnings Schedule. The earnings calendar shows upcoming earnings release dates for Lucid Group throughout 2026, along with the time of release and any scheduled conference calls. Current coverage includes comprehensive data on next quarter release, as well as historical earnings results and guidance for prior quarters. Analyst Forecasts. Multiple Wall Street analysts provide earnings estimates and price targets for LCID stock through Nasdaq's platform, including consensus estimates, high estimates, and low estimates across various metrics. The data is continuously updated as new analyst reports and earnings results are published.
